Skyes Over London · Deep Scan Valuation Mode

Section 60 Shallow Fixture — Investor Audit Website

Generated from a launch-backed deep scan, replay evidence, and valuation-mode scoring.

Confidence
HIGH

Category thesis

Section 60 Shallow Fixture was ingested from user-supplied project material, reconstructed into a launchable environment, tested end to end, and priced from actual proof-backed depth instead of brochure language.

Why this valuation was earned

  • Project launched in a deployed-style local preview during deep scan.
  • 2 route probes passed.
  • 1 end-to-end action probes passed.
  • 4 proof integrations linked into the valuation lane.
  • 4 deployment/runtime descriptors were discovered.
  • 2 visible controls were harvested from rendered surfaces.
  • 2 document dossier items were extracted through the integrated Skye Reader lane.
  • 0 reader-derived product, proof, monetization, and compliance signals were harvested.
  • 3 mirrored services and 0 mirrored environment variables were reconstructed.
  • Autonomy posture during deep scan was 'full-autonomous'.
  • Foundry white-label signals were detected in the scanned project.
  • 0 maintenance candidates were detected.
  • 0 ownership/commercial restriction signals were detected.
  • 2 DevGlow surface mappings were inferred.
  • 0 registered platform launch profiles and 0 branch apps were linked through the launchpad lane.
